title_en: エリカエクスプレスは武豊とのコンビ継続でクイーンSへ
description: ヴィクトリアマイル4着のエリカエクスプレス(牝4＝杉山晴、父エピファネイア)は武豊とのコンビ継続でクイーンS(8月2日、札幌芝1800メートル)へ。 武豊とは昨年の秋華賞(2着)から5走連続のコンビとなる。

description: 11日に英ニューマーケット競馬場で行われるG1ジュライC(芝直線1200メートル)に向かうサトノレーヴ(牡7＝堀)が現地時間8日、ニューマーケット調教場のアルバハスリ(ポリトラック)を単走で追い切った。 タイムはGPS計測で4F50秒4〜1F11秒3。堀師は「中間もカイ食いが良く、健康状態は安定しています。行く気にあふれ7、8分くらいの手応えで余力を残して走り切れました。前走と同様、いい状態で臨めるとみています」とコメン?..

description: 26年度の顕彰馬選定で殿堂入りを果たした新種牡馬オジュウチョウサンの産駒がデビューを迎える。日曜福島5R(芝1800メートル)にタクミオジュウ(牡＝小島)がスタンバイ。初年度産駒の先陣を切る一戦へ斉藤助手は「オジュウチョウサンの子で注目を集めるでしょうし、頑張ってもらいたい」と好走を期待する。 父はJ・G1・9勝の名ハードラー。ファン投票で選出された18年有馬記念(9着)は直線入り口で2番手に浮上するなど見せ場?..

description: 日曜小倉6R(芝1200メートル)で初陣を迎えるマルモリムソウ(牡＝大橋、父ビッグアーサー)はCWコースの1週前追いで6F79秒2の好時計。直線は外の先輩馬2頭に遅れたが、非凡な脚力を示した。 担当の竹内助手は「先週に時計を出したので今週(CWコース6F83秒8〜1F11秒5)はしまいだけ。前向きさがありながらコントロールが利きます。あまり物見したりしないし、物おじしない感じです」と素質の高さを感じている。

title_en: 【福島新馬戦】リサナウト評判上々 黒岩師「気も動きもいい」
description: 日曜福島5Rはリサナウト(牝＝黒岩、父リオンディーズ)の評判がいい。祖母はG1・2勝のエアグルーヴ、母グルヴェイグは12年マーメイドS勝ちと優秀な牝系が目を引く。 最終追いは坂路で4F52秒4〜1F12秒1(馬なり)。黒岩師は「仕上がりは良好。気も動きもいいです。線の細さは課題ですけど、体力が備わってきた。スピードもありますし、能力通りならと期待しています」と力を込めた。

description: 7月9日の川崎競馬トリプル馬単は、最初の10Rが6番人気ラムテリオス、9番人気ボニーマジェスティの順に入線。馬単(7)―(3)は6万9070円(73番人気)だった。 この前日から約6419万円のキャリーオーバーがあったことから、発売口数は2066万3968口(1口10円)と大幅に売り上げが増えていたが、初っぱなからの波乱で残りは1万8500口まで激減した。 続く11Rは2番人気のベアバッキューンが勝つも、2着が9番人気のランリョ?..

title_en: 【七夕賞】「46歳もいい年になるように」誕生日後、最初の重賞でバトルボーンと挑む戸崎圭太騎手 歴代最多の5勝目へ
description: ◆第62回七夕賞・G3(7月12日、福島競馬場・芝2000メートル) 8日に46歳の誕生日を迎えた戸崎圭太騎手＝美浦・田島俊明厩舎＝。「この年になると特に変わりはないですが、46歳もいい年になるように頑張りたいと思います」と意気込んだ。毎年、誕生日の前後に行われる七夕賞は相性がよく、岡部幸雄氏と並ぶ歴代最多タイの4勝を誇る。今年のパートナーは初コンビのバトルボーン(牡7歳、美浦・林徹厩舎、父シルバーステート)?..

title_en: Gulfstream Park Raises Sunshine Meet Purses
description: Gulfstream Park's Sunshine Meet will feature 14 stakes races with over $1.9 million in purses. The Sept. 12 $225,000 Princess Rooney Stakes (G3) serves as a 'Win and You're In' qualifier for the Oct. 31 Breeders' Cup Filly & Mare Sprint (G1).

title_en: Precise Leads Field in Falmouth Stakes
description: Aidan O'Brien's relentless march toward breaking his own record for the most group 1 wins in a year continues as favorite Precise faces six rivals in the July 10 Falmouth Stakes (G1).

title_en: Rebel's Romance Digs Deep in Princess of Wales's Stakes
description: The globetrotting Rebel's Romance justified 8-11 favoritism in gutsy fashion in the July 9 Princess of Wales's Stakes (G2) for Godolphin and Charlie Appleby. The 8-year-old Dubawi gelding notched his 22nd career win.

title_en: Velvet Beretta Becomes Cyberknife's First Winner
description: The first-out winner captured a 5 1/2-furlong maiden special weight July 9 at Ellis Park by 3 lengths.

title_en: Delaware Park Cancels Racing July 9 After Heavy Rain
description: With showers of heavy rain hitting the area, Delaware Park canceled racing July 9 following the first race.

title_en: NTRA's 'Beat Byk' Contest to Kick Off
description: This year's "Beat Byk" season gives horseplayers a free chance to compete for a berth in the March 5-7 National Horseplayers Championship at the Horseshoe Las Vegas.

title_en: Dubai Racing Club, York Deal Creates Path to Meydan
description: Dubai Racing Club announced July 9 a new international partnership with York Racecourse that will further strengthen the pathway for Europe's leading middle-distance horses to compete at Meydan Racecourse during the Dubai Racing Carnival.

title_en: Antonucci Suspension, Fine Reduced by HIWU
description: Trainer Jena Antonucci was penalized March 30 following a positive test for a lidocaine metabolite in a maiden winner in June 2025. Additional evidence not analyzed during the hearing prompted HIWU to reduce her suspension and fine.

title_en: McAnally Griffin Supports TCA Grants With $50,000 Gift
description: Shannon McAnally Griffin, niece of prominent trainer Ronald McAnally, continues her family's racing legacy with a $50,000 gift to Thoroughbred Charities of America, whose mission is to support the well-being of both horses and their caretakers.

title_en: Country Life Farm to Stand Regally Bred Provenance
description: While injury limited on-track opportunities for grade 2-placed Provenance, the son of seven-time leading sire Into Mischief out of two-time champion Monomoy Girl will bring plenty of star power to Maryland when he stands at Country Life Farm in 2027.

title_en: Ombudsman Joins Ka Ying Rising Atop Racehorse Rankings
description: Ka Ying Rising no longer stands alone at the top of the latest Longines World's Best Racehorse Rankings. The rankings, released July 9, place Ombudsman, unbeaten in three starts this year, alongside the Hong Kong sprint sensation.

title_en: Oaklawn Park Raises Purses for Numerous Key Stakes
description: Oaklawn Park unveils its 2026-2027 stakes schedule, featuring 61 stakes races worth $18.79 million. The Rebel Stakes (G2) receives a $250,000 purse increase, bringing its total purse to $1.25 million.

title_en: Jockeys, Horsemen Tipoff for Charity Ballgame
description: Jockeys will take on horsemen in the Aug. 5 charity basketball game at the Saratoga Springs Recreation Center. The event benefits programs within the New York Track Chaplaincy and the Permanently Disabled Jockeys Fund, with free admission for fans.

title_en: Horsepower: Maffei Aims for F1-Type Success With Racing
description: One of the key figures behind Formula 1 auto racing's meteoric rise in popularity plans to help launch a team-based horse racing league next season that has drawn many of the sport's biggest owners, according to a July 9 release.

title_en: Odds and Trends: Handicapping 2YOs at Del Mar, Saratoga
description: Odds and Trends with J. Keeler Johnson

title_en: Panel Provides Insights for Owners on Expected Expenses
description: View From the Owner's Box for July 2026 looks at typical expenses Thoroughbred owners can expect. Panelists include Tracy Attfield of TLore, Emily Anderson of Dean Dorton, and trainer David Donk.

title_en: Joseph Sends Out Formidable Duo in Spa's Caress
description: One winner exiting a race does not make it a "key" race, but there's no doubt the May 2 Churchill Distaff Turf Mile Stakes (G2T) at Churchill Downs was a "key" race.

title_en: Navajo Warrior Primed for Cornhusker Handicap
description: A field of nine experienced males will contest the $300,000 Cornhusker Handicap (G3) July 11 at Prairie Meadows. Last year's victor Cornishman is set to clash with recent grade 3 winners Navajo Warrior and Heroic Move.

title_en: Prom Queen Eyes Class Relief in Indiana Oaks
description: Delta Squad Racing's graded stakes winner Prom Queen will look to get back on track July 11 in the $200,000 Indiana Oaks (G3) at Horseshoe Indianapolis.

title_en: Stakes-Placed Aegina Tops Day 2 of Tatts July Sale
description: Aegina, a 3-year-old stakes-placed daughter of Havana Grey, fetched $240,000 guineas from Nick Turnbull's County Durham-based Elwick Stud.

title_en: Convergent, Rebel's Romance Run in Princess of Wales's
description: Convergent heads to Newmarket for the first time to contest the Princess of Wales's Stakes (G2) and is set to race on ground quicker than good for the first time in his career.

title_en: Santa Anita Autumn Meet to Maintain Spring Purses
description: Santa Anita Park will maintain spring-level purses when its autumn meet begins in September, an increase from the previous two autumn meets.

title_en: Castellano Out for Three Weeks Following Saratoga Spill
description: Jockey Javier Castellano will be out for three weeks with a minor lower back injury following a four-horse spill in the July 3 Wild Applause Stakes at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Walden Hopes Patience Pays Off for Minaret Station
description: A graded winner at 2 who raced just once at 3, Minaret Station seeks a return to graded glory when he stretches out in the $250,000 Bowling Green Stakes (G2T) July 11 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Our Moneyman Eyes Upgrade in Indiana Derby
description: Our Moneyman, a stakes-winning, graded-placed son of Mr. Money, is looking for his first graded win in the July 11 Indiana Derby (G3) at Horseshoe Indianapolis.

title_en: Albus, Incredibolt Receiving Time Off
description: Both of Pin Oak Stud's Kentucky Derby (G1) contenders, Albus and Incredibolt, will get a few months off at the farm, trainer Riley Mott said July 8.

title_en: Jockeys' Guild Names Carmouche Jockey of the Week
description: Phileas Fogg posts a 10-length victory in the July 4 Suburban Stakes (G2) at Saratoga Race Course under Kendrick Carmouche, earning the rider Jockey of the Week honors.

title_en: Ole Crazy Bone Back in Graded Company for Bowling Green
description: Making his second start off a layoff that followed his Kentucky Turf Cup Invitational Stakes (G2T) win last September, Ole Crazy Bone is back against graded company in the $250,000 Bowling Green Stakes (G2T) July 11 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Scarlett Begonia, Antivenom Blossom at Ellis Park
description: Two nicely bred juveniles became BloodHorse Maiden Watch Hot Prospects with comfortable debut victories at Ellis Park. Antivenom, a son of Candy Ride, broke his maiden July 4 before the Life Is Good filly Scarlett Begonia followed suit July 6.

title_en: Inaugural Becca Taylor Highlights Los Al September Meet
description: The first running of the $100,000 Becca Taylor Stakes will highlight the upcoming September Thoroughbred meet at Los Alamitos Race Course.

title_en: Tommy Jo, Iron Orchard Return in Victory Ride
description: Grade 1 winners Tommy Jo and Iron Orchard make their first starts since the Oct. 31 Breeders' Cup Juvenile Fillies (G1) in the $225,000 Victory Ride Stakes (G3) July 10 at Saratoga Race Course.

title_en: Magnitude Reigns Supreme in NTRA Poll
description: With a lack of major fixtures for older horses over the past week, Magnitude remained No. 1 in the National Thoroughbred Racing Association's Top Thoroughbred Poll released July 7.

title_en: Dollars & Sense: Two Sets of Numbers, Different Stories
description: Dollars & Sense with Frank Angst looks at some more encouraging wagering numbers from NYRA at a time that overall handle continues to slide.

title_en: When Sweet Azteca Runs, She's Very, Very Good
description: The daughter of Sharp Azteca has started 10 times in three years, but owns six graded stakes wins among those starts. The key to her female family's success could be in the daughters' mitochondrial DNA.

title_en: Broodmare Retirement Summit July 24 at Keeneland
description: Mareworthy Charities will host the Thoroughbred Broodmare Retirement Summit from 1-3 p.m. Friday, July 24, at Keeneland. The event will update the work to strengthen long-term outcomes for mares after their breeding careers end.

title_en: Englishman to Stud at Lane's End After Racing
description: Englishman recently won the Woody Stephens Stakes (G1) at Saratoga Race Course. He is expected to continue racing through 2027.

title_en: Greatest Joy is First Winner for Greatest Honour
description: The Divine Light Healing Ministries homebred filly wins her racing debut July 6 with trainer Kevin Rice at Presque Isle Downs by 1 1/4 lengths.

title_en: Researcher O'Casaigh Buys 90% Interest in Early Voting
description: Dr. Padraig O'Casaigh announced July 6 he bought the majority interest in Early Voting. He said proceeds from the stallion's stud fees will be used to provide financial assistance to veterinary school students.

title_en: Field of Gold Retired, to Stand at Juddmonte in 2027
description: Field of Gold, Europe's champion 3-year-old miler, has been retired from racing as of July 5 and will begin a new chapter at stud with Juddmonte in 2027.

title_en: Hot Rod Honey Becomes Roadster's First Stakes Winner
description: Hot Rod Honey becomes the initial stakes winner for Ocala Stud's first-crop sire Roadster with a striking 4 1/4-length victory in the $96,500 Sharp Susan Stakes July 3 at Gulfstream Park.

title_en: Box Office Hit is First Winner for Idol
description: Box Office Hit wins her racing debut July 2 by 6 1/4 lengths at Thistledown for Mast Thoroughbreds and trainer Robert Gorham.

title_en: Exploring Clever Pedigrees of Miss Vyvyanne, Lagynos
description: The pedigree match is not unimportant, but numerous examples exist of a clever pedigree pattern upgrading a modest commercial background. Recent graded stakes winners Miss Vyvyanne and Lagynos are good examples.

title_en: Hinkle Farms' Success a Century in the Making
description: Giulio's Jewel, dam of Deterministic, is just one aspect of Hinkle Farms' success. The family-run venture has been in constant evolution since the land was purchased by Anne Archer Hinkle's great-grandfather in 1926.

title_en: Grade 1 Winner, Sire Channel Cat Sold to Turkey
description: Channel Cat is a freshman sire by multiple leading turf sire English Channel.

title_en: Antiope First Winner for Freshman Sire Jackie's Warrior
description: Antiope scores in her career debut June 26 at Colonial Downs, becoming the first winner for Spendthrift Farm's freshman sire Jackie's Warrior.

title_en: Mystic Guide Sires First Winner in South Korea
description: First-time starter Seraph won her debut by 7 lengths June 26 at Busan Racecourse.

title_en: BloodHorse.com Launches Maiden Watch Landing Page
description: BloodHorse.com has launched a Maiden Watch landing page that will allow our readers to quickly see the horses we have highlighted in the Maiden Watch column that appears in BloodHorse Daily.

title_en: Prominent North Carolina Breeder Shuford Dies at 79
description: Nancy Shuford was honored as North Carolina Breeder of the Year seven times between 2013 and 2025 by the Thoroughbred Owners and Breeders Association. She bred 13 black-type winners, including six graded stakes winners.

title_en: Flight Command Soars, First U.S. Winner for Flightline
description: Flight Command became the first American winner for Flightline in romping by 10 lengths in front-running fashion in the fifth race June 25 at Aqueduct Racetrack.

title_en: Ontario Commits CA$35M Annually to Equine Industry
description: The Ontario government is increasing support for agriculture and rural jobs across Ontario by contributing an additional CA$35 million annually for the next five years. About 80% goes to support Ontario's breeding sector and racing participants.
